message:
fix: use created_at fallback for draft nightly release ordering (#8718)

Draft nightly releases have unset published_at, causing zero-time
timestamps that break sort ordering. Use created_at as a fallback
when published_at is unavailable in both the Go backend and Netlify
function. Also fix stale comment that referenced filtering out drafts.

Fixes #8714

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
